label: Alzheimer disease
definition: A progressive neurodegenerative disorder characterized by memory loss and cognitive decline.

label: Parkinson disease
definition: A movement disorder due to loss of dopaminergic neurons with tremor and rigidity.

label: Breast carcinoma
definition: A malignant neoplasm arising from the epithelial cells of the breast tissue.

label: Type 2 diabetes mellitus
definition: A metabolic disease characterized by insulin resistance and hyperglycemia.

label: Atherosclerosis
definition: A condition in which the arteries narrow due to plaque buildup, elevating risk of heart attack.

label: Asthma
definition: A chronic inflammatory disease of the airways characterized by variable airflow obstruction.

label: Chronic kidney disease
definition: A long-term condition where the kidneys do not work as well as they should.

label: Lung carcinoma
definition: A malignant tumor of the lung, often associated with smoking but also occurring in non-smokers.

label: Coronary artery disease
definition: A disease of the coronary arteries characterized by reduced blood flow to the heart muscle.

label: Amyotrophic lateral sclerosis
definition: A progressive neurodegenerative disease affecting motor neurons leading to muscle weakness.

label: Colorectal carcinoma
definition: A malignant epithelial neoplasm of the colon or rectum.

label: Prostate carcinoma
definition: A malignant neoplasm originating in the prostate gland.

label: Hypertension
definition: A condition in which the blood pressure in the arteries is persistently elevated.

label: Myocardial infarction
definition: Commonly known as a heart attack; necrosis of the myocardium due to ischemia.

label: Heart failure
definition: A clinical syndrome where the heart is unable to pump sufficient blood to meet the body's needs.

label: Epilepsy
definition: A neurological disorder characterized by recurrent unprovoked seizures.

label: Stroke
definition: A sudden loss of brain function due to disturbance in the blood supply to the brain.

label: Rheumatoid arthritis
definition: An autoimmune disease that causes chronic inflammation of joints and other areas of the body.

label: Chronic obstructive pulmonary disease
definition: A group of progressive lung diseases including emphysema and chronic bronchitis.

label: Osteoporosis
definition: A skeletal disorder characterized by compromised bone strength predisposing to an increased risk of fracture.
